ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_title" TEXT /* Title of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event is scheduled */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the event will take place */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., conference, workshop) */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "virtual_link" TEXT /* Link for virtual participation */,
  "registration_open" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if registration is open */,
  "max_attendees" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attendees allowed */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizer responsible for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event to which the session belongs */,
  "session_title" TEXT /* Title of the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker leading the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., keynote, panel, networking) */,
  "virtual_link" TEXT /* Link for virtual participation */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attendees for the session */,
  "equipment_needed" TEXT /* Equipment needed for the session (e.g., projector, microphones) */,
  "has_break" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the session has a break */,
  "break_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the break in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attendees the location can accommodate */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available at the location (e.g., Wi-Fi, parking) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "speaker_name" TEXT /* Full name of the speaker */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the speaker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the speaker */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the speaker (e.g., university, company) */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the speaker's photo */,
  "linkedin_url" TEXT /* URL of the speaker's LinkedIn profile */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the speaker */,
  "is_keynote" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the speaker is a keynote speaker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendees" (
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendee */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the attendee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the attendee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the attendee (e.g., participant, speaker, organizer) */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company of the attendee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the attendee */,
  "is_virtual" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the attendee is participating virtually */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the attendee registered */,
  "dietary_restrictions" TEXT /* Dietary restrictions of the attendee */,
  "special_requests" TEXT /* Special requests (e.g., accessibility needs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session attended */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., joined, left) */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session the attendee attended */,
  "virtual_attendance" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the attendance was virtual */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the attendance in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "catering" (
  "catering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the catering service */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event for which catering is arranged */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of catering service (e.g., breakfast, lunch) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time for service */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time for service */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the catering service */,
  "caterer_name" TEXT /* Name of the caterer */,
  "menu" TEXT /* Description of the menu */,
  "dietary_options" TEXT /* Dietary options available (e.g., vegetarian, vegan) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the caterer */,
  "estimated_cost" TEXT /* Estimated cost of the catering service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("catering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_catering_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee providing feedback */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event for which feedback is given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the attendee (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or suggestions from the attendee */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session for which feedback is given */,
  "session_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the specific session */,
  "session_comments" TEXT /* Comments or suggestions for the specific session */,
  "overall_rating" INTEGER /* Overall rating for the event */,
  "overall_comments" TEXT /* Overall comments or suggestions for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
